title: iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates family as a Full Stack Developer in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates:
iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates!
